new_value:
{"description":"Finalize bulk hardware procurement, automated flashing, and post-conference resale strategy for T-Echo nodes to support the 500-unit deployment.

**Actionable next steps:**
1. Reach out to LilyGO (sales@lilygo.cc or distributor) for official bulk quote on 500+ T-Echo units targeting <8/unit landed.
2. Design and prototype scalable flashing station (multiple UF2/serial, automated key gen/provisioning for link layer and OSCORE, test vector validation).
3. Define end-to-end resale process: conference floor sales, online store setup, warranty terms, GPL source code delivery mechanism (QR to GitHub tag or USB).
4. Build full profit & loss model: procurement cost, flashing/assembly labor/volunteers, shipping, margin targets at 5-85 sale price, surplus for next events.
5. Investigate partnerships with LoRa hardware resellers or Meshtastic community channels for distribution.
6. Create inventory and logistics plan for initial 500 units across 3 events.
7. Add bead for legal/compliance review (GPL, export controls if any).

This completes the hardware resale pillar of the revenue strategy.","priority":2}
